description: Integrate Kotlin Serialization into the GitHubBrowser project by adding the org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization plugin and the org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json:1.6.3 dependency. In the com.example.githubbrowser.model package, create @Serializable data classes Owner and GitHubRepo using @SerialName to map snake_case JSON fields to camelCase properties. The Owner class must contain id (Long), login (String), avatarUrl (from avatar_url), and htmlUrl (from html_url). The GitHubRepo class must contain id (Long), name (String), fullName (from full_name), owner (Owner), description (nullable String), htmlUrl (from html_url), stargazersCount (from stargazers_count, Int), language (nullable String), forksCount (from forks_count, Int), and openIssuesCount (from open_issues_count, Int). Ensure the project builds successfully after configuration.
